title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 86.
content:
There was an Old Man of the West,
    Who never could get any rest;
    So they set him to spin,
    On his nose find his chin,
    Which cured that Old Man of the West.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 86."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
